title: Watershed
description: Defines a watershed as a primary ecological boundary for stewardship, observation, seed adaptation, and hydrological context within the Cascadia Seed Guild Agentic Data Layer.

watershed_id.description: Unique identifier for the watershed record.

alternate_names.description: Other names, legacy names, or indigenous names associated with the watershed.

description.description: Narrative description of the watershed and its ecological significance.

hydrology_type.description: Primary hydrological character of the watershed.

region.description: Administrative or geographic region in which the watershed is primarily situated.

bioregion_id.description: Reference to a related bioregion record, if applicable.

parent_watershed_id.description: Reference to a larger watershed containing this watershed, if nested.

outflow.description: Primary downstream receiving body, such as a river, estuary, bay, lake, or ocean.

headwaters_description.description: Description of the watershed's headwaters or upper source area.

area_sq_km.description: Approximate area of the watershed in square kilometers.

dominant_soil_types.description: Major soil types associated with the watershed.

dominant_ecosystems.description: Major ecosystem types present within the watershed.

climate_notes.description: General climatic notes relevant to the watershed.

seasonal_patterns.description: Important seasonal patterns affecting stewardship and ecological behavior.

ecological_functions.description: Key ecological functions associated with the watershed.

stewardship_risks.description: Known ecological or stewardship risks affecting the watershed.

seed_adaptation_notes.description: Notes on how watershed conditions may influence seed adaptation, propagation, or selection.

geometry.description: Optional geospatial representation of the watershed boundary.

type.description: GeoJSON geometry type or similar representation type.

coordinates.description: Coordinates for the geometry, typically following GeoJSON conventions.

related_council_decision_ids.description: References to council decisions relevant to this watershed.

related_stewardship_event_ids.description: References to stewardship events associated with this watershed.

metadata.description: Optional metadata for provenance, authorship, and versioning.
